transcript: Prep skin with Tonique Comfort. Pour toner onto a cotton pad and apply all over for smooth, hydrated and glowy skin. Apply a dropper full of Advanced Genifique Face Serum to the palm of your hands. Massage and press into skin with fingertips for a boost of radiance, hydration and anti-aging benefits. Moisturize with Renergy Lift Multi-Action Ultra Face Cream for a tightening, lifting and firming effect. Apply Advanced Genifique Eye Cream by dotting under eye using your ring finger or finger with the lightest touch to instantly smooth fine lines and wrinkles. Pop Blushing Tresor Shade on cheeks up to temples and center bridge of nose with full face brush number five for a touch of highlight sweep rose gold shade to cheekbones using contour brush number seven or fingertips to define crease applied shade ladies night with all over a shadow brush number 10 apply dressy brown shade to lids. Apply dressy beige shade to inner eye corners to brighten eye look. Line and define upper lash line with the shade Bruun Adore. To complete the sultry eye look apply Lashie Doll mascara for lifted lengthened lashes. To balance out the smokey eye, apply a neutral lip like L'Absolu Gloss in Atelier Parisienne 213. Finish with the Via Belle fragrance to experience joyous femininity through this energizing perfume. When it's time to take it all off, shake to activate Bifacil Eye Makeup Remover. Pour onto a cotton pad until fully saturated and remove even the most stubborn makeup. Repeat as needed. Lancôme's Beauty Box is loaded with eight full-size products all wrapped up in a sustainable golden case made of 100% recycled materials.
